memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Mesh mesh, in MR.AffineXf3f meshXf, MR.Const_SimpleVolumeMinMax volume, in MR.AffineXf3f volumeXf)
memberdef.name: Const_MeshOnVoxelsT_MRMesh_MRSimpleVolumeMinMax

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Std.Vector_MRVector3f result, in MR.Vector3f pos, in MR.Vector3f offset)
memberdef.name: getPoints

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Std.Vector_Float result, in MR.Vector3f pos, in MR.Vector3f offset)
memberdef.name: getValues

briefdescription.para: Helper class to organize mesh and voxels volume access and build point sequences.

simplesect.para: this class is not thread-safe but accessing same volume from different instances is ok Generated from class MR::MeshOnVoxelsT<MR.Mesh, MR.SimpleVolumeMinMax>. This is the const half of the class.
